recommendation: Implement automated account provisioning and deprovisioning workflows, enforce periodic access reviews, and disable inactive accounts
Enforce role-based access control (RBAC) policies and restrict unauthorized access to sensitive systems and data
Enforce information flow control policies to restrict unauthorized data transfers between systems and network boundaries
Apply least privilege principles by removing excessive permissions and regularly reviewing privileged access roles
Ensure systems generate sufficient audit records for all critical events, including authentication and data access
Enable centralized logging of system and user activity, ensuring logs capture authentication, access, and administrative actions
Implement continuous monitoring and alerting for suspicious activity, and regularly review logs for anomalies
Establish controlled change management processes, including approval workflows and change tracking
Enforce secure baseline configurations, automate patch management, and continuously monitor configuration drift
Disable unnecessary services and ports to reduce system attack surface
Establish system recovery procedures to restore operations after failures or incidents
Perform regular backups, validate backup integrity, and conduct periodic restoration testing
Require MFA for all users, enforce phishing-resistant authentication for privileged accounts, and integrate conditional access policies
Secure credential storage using vaults, enforce strong password policies, and implement periodic credential rotation
Establish incident response procedures, including detection, containment, eradication, and recovery processes
Implement mechanisms for timely reporting and escalation of security incidents
Integrate static and dynamic security testing into CI/CD pipelines and enforce secure coding practices
Validate third-party components, enforce code integrity checks, and monitor dependencies for vulnerabilities
Protect session integrity by enforcing secure session tokens, implementing session timeouts, and preventing session fixation attacks
Encrypt sensitive data at rest, enforce secure storage practices, and manage encryption keys securely
Implement rate limiting, traffic filtering, and resource controls to protect systems against denial of service attacks
Implement network segmentation, firewall rules, and secure access controls to restrict unauthorized network traffic
Encrypt data in transit using secure protocols such as TLS and enforce secure communication channels
Enforce strict input validation and sanitization for all user inputs to prevent injection and application-layer attacks
Implement secure error handling to prevent information disclosure through system error messages
Implement redundancy and failover mechanisms to ensure system availability during component failures
Continuously monitor systems for anomalous behavior using detection tools and alerting mechanisms
Deploy file and system integrity monitoring tools to detect unauthorized changes to critical systems
